title: Well-posedness and sharp interface limit of a non-isothermal Navier--Stokes/Allen--Cahn model
summary: We propose a thermodynamically consistent phase-field model for the flow of a mixture of two different viscous incompressible fluids of equal density in a bounded domain. We prove the well-posedness of local-in-time strong solutions by means of maximal regularity and contraction mapping arguments. We introduce a suitable entropic weak formulation of the problem, replacing the heat equation by the total energy inequality and an entropy production inequality, and we rigorously prove global-in-time existence of such weak solutions, developing a novel approximation scheme. We also show that an entropic weak solution to this non-isothermal phase-field model converges to a distributional (or $BV$) solution to a non-isothermal Navier--Stokes/mean curvature flow, under an energy convergence assumption.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一个热力学一致的非等温相场模型，用于描述两种等密度粘性不可压缩流体的混合流动
AI.motivation: 研究两种等密度粘性不可压缩流体混合流动的非等温相场模型，建立热力学一致的数学模型框架，解决相场模型在非等温条件下的数学理论问题
AI.techniques: 最大正则性理论、压缩映射原理、熵弱解构造、能量不等式、熵产生不等式、新颖的逼近格式、分布解收敛分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了局部强解的存在唯一性、全局熵弱解的存在性、以及熵弱解向非等温Navier-Stokes/平均曲率流分布解的收敛性
AI.significance: 为非等温相场模型建立了严格的数学理论框架，连接了相场模型与平均曲率流，在流体力学和相变理论中具有重要理论意义

title: A class of Hartree-Fock systems with null mass via Nehari-Pohozaev with logarithmic interactions
summary: We establish the existence and qualitative properties of nontrivial solutions for a class of Hartree-Fock type systems defined over the whole space $\mathbb{R}^2$. By introducing a suitable Nehari-Pohozaev manifold, we prove the existence, regularity and we describe the asymptotic behavior of solutions with respect to the interaction parameter $β> 0$. In particular, we show that the system admits either a vector ground state or a semitrivial ground state solution, depending on the magnitude of $β$.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维全空间上Hartree-Fock型系统非平凡解的存在性、正则性和渐近行为，揭示了系统存在向量基态解或半平凡基态解取决于相互作用参数β的大小
AI.motivation: 研究二维全空间上Hartree-Fock型系统的非平凡解，这类系统在量子力学和凝聚态物理中描述多体相互作用，特别是在二维系统中具有重要物理意义
AI.techniques: 引入合适的Nehari-Pohozaev流形，结合变分方法和临界点理论，分析解的正则性和渐近行为
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统非平凡解的存在性、正则性和渐近行为；特别地，系统要么存在向量基态解，要么存在半平凡基态解，具体取决于相互作用参数β的大小
AI.significance: 为二维量子系统提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了相互作用参数对基态性质的决定性影响，对理解低维量子系统的物理性质有重要意义

title: Fokker-Planck equations on discrete infinite graphs
summary: We study the gradient flow structure and long-time behavior of Fokker-Planck equations (FPE) on infinite graphs, along with a Talagrand-type inequality in this setting. We begin by constructing an infinite-dimensional Hilbert manifold structure, extending the approach of [S. N. Chow, W. Huang, Y. Li, H. M. Zhou, Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal., 203, 969-1008 (2012)] through a novel classification method to establish injectivity of the map from quotient space to tangent space and employing functional analysis techniques to prove surjectivity. Using a combination of the relative energy method, approximation techniques, and continuity arguments, we establish the global existence and asymptotic convergence of solutions to the infinite-dimensional ODE system associated with the FPE. Specifically, we demonstrate that the FPE admits a gradient flow structure, with solutions converging exponentially to the unique Gibbs distribution. Furthermore, we prove a local Talagrand-type inequality and compare the Hilbert manifold metric induced by our framework with classical Wasserstein distances.

AI.tldr: 在无限图上建立Fokker-Planck方程的梯度流结构，证明解指数收敛到Gibbs分布，并建立局部Talagrand型不等式
AI.motivation: 研究无限图上Fokker-Planck方程的梯度流结构和长时间行为，将有限维流形方法推广到无限维情形，建立无限图上的输运不等式理论
AI.techniques: 构造无限维Hilbert流形结构，使用商空间分类方法证明映射的单射性，功能分析技术证明满射性，结合相对能量方法、逼近技术和连续性论证
AI.main_theorems: 1) FPE具有梯度流结构；2) 解指数收敛到唯一Gibbs分布；3) 局部Talagrand型不等式；4) Hilbert流形度量与经典Wasserstein距离的比较
AI.significance: 将有限维流形理论推广到无限图，为无限图上的输运不等式和梯度流理论提供新框架，连接概率论与几何分析

title: Boundary blow-up solutions to real $(N-1)$-Monge-Ampère equations with singular weights

AI.tldr: 研究了实(N-1)-Monge-Ampère方程在球域上的边界爆破问题，证明了无穷多个径向(N-1)-凸解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究实(N-1)-Monge-Ampère方程的边界爆破问题，这类方程是Monge-Ampère方程的重要推广，在几何分析和偏微分方程理论中有重要意义。问题涉及奇异权重函数和满足Keller-Osserman条件的非线性项，在球域上考虑径向解的存在性。
AI.techniques: 使用上下解方法结合比较原理，通过构造适当的子解和超解来证明解的存在性。针对径向对称性简化问题，利用(N-1)-凸性的特殊结构进行分析。
AI.main_theorems: 在球域Ω⊂ℝ^N (N≥2)上，对于具有奇异权重K(|x|)和满足Keller-Osserman条件的非线性项f(z)的(N-1)-Monge-Ampère方程，证明了无穷多个径向(N-1)-凸解的存在性，这些解在边界处爆破（趋于无穷大）。
AI.significance: 扩展了Monge-Ampère方程边界爆破问题的研究范围，将经典Monge-Ampère算子推广到(N-1)-Monge-Ampère算子，为奇异权重和非线性项条件下的解的存在性提供了新的理论结果，对几何分析和完全非线性椭圆方程理论有重要贡献。

title: The Calderón Problem for Quasilinear Conductivities of Conformally Transversally Anisotropic Media
summary: This paper investigates Calderón's problem on a conformally transversally anisotropic manifold $ (M,g) $ of dimension $n \geq 3$, where the conductivity $ a(s,x,p) $ might depend on both the electric potential and the electric field. We establish that for all $(t,x)\in \mathbb{R}\times M$ and $β\in \mathbb{N}^{1+n}$ the derivatives $ \partial_{(s,p)}^βa(s,x,p)|_{(s,p)=(t,0)}$ are uniquely determined by the boundary voltage-current measurements. If $ a(s,x,p) $ is analytic in $ p $, then $ a(s,x,p) $ can be uniquely recovered.

AI.tldr: 建立了在共形横向各向异性流形上Calderón问题中依赖于电势和电场的电导率系数的唯一性结果
AI.motivation: 研究Calderón逆问题在更一般的电导率系数下的唯一性，该系数不仅依赖于空间位置，还依赖于电势和电场强度，这在非线性材料建模中具有实际意义
AI.techniques: 使用共形横向各向异性流形上的几何方法，结合边界电压-电流测量数据，通过导数确定和解析延拓技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对于所有(t,x)和多重指标β，导数∂_{(s,p)}^βa(s,x,p)|_{(s,p)=(t,0)}可由边界测量唯一确定；2) 若a(s,x,p)关于p解析，则整个函数a(s,x,p)可唯一恢复
AI.significance: 将Calderón问题推广到更一般的非线性电导率模型，为非线性材料电导率成像提供了理论基础，扩展了逆问题理论的应用范围

title: Concentration in selection-mutation models: error estimates and asymptotic expansions
summary: In this paper, we study an integro-differential equation which describes the evolutionary dynamics of a population structured by a phenotypic trait. This population undergoes asexual reproduction, competition, selection, and mutation. We provide an asymptotic analysis of the model, assuming that the mutations have small effects. A standard approach for the analysis of the qualitative properties of the solutions of such an equation is to apply a logarithmic transformation, which yields a Hamilton-Jacobi equation with constraint. When the reproduction term is a concave function of the trait, it has been established that the solution is classical. We rigorously derive a first-order asymptotic expansion of the solution. This expansion allows us to approximate the moments of the phenotypic density. This result establishes a connection between the approximations of the phenotypic density obtained via the Hamilton-Jacobi approach and relevant biological quantities, which are more suitable from a modeling perspective.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过Hamilton-Jacobi方法推导了具有小突变效应的表型结构种群模型的渐近展开，建立了Hamilton-Jacobi近似与生物相关量之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究表型结构种群的进化动力学，该种群经历无性繁殖、竞争、选择和突变过程。核心问题是分析小突变效应下模型的渐近行为，建立Hamilton-Jacobi方法与生物相关量之间的数学联系。
AI.techniques: 使用对数变换将积分-微分方程转化为带约束的Hamilton-Jacobi方程；当繁殖项是表型性状的凹函数时，采用经典解方法；严格推导解的一阶渐近展开；利用渐近展开近似表型密度的矩。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当繁殖项为凹函数时，解是经典的；2. 严格推导了解的一阶渐近展开；3. 利用渐近展开近似表型密度的矩；4. 建立了Hamilton-Jacobi近似与生物相关量之间的数学联系。
AI.significance: 为表型进化动力学提供了严格的数学框架，将抽象的Hamilton-Jacobi方法与具体的生物量（如表型密度的矩）联系起来，使模型更适用于实际生物学建模，推动了进化动力学与偏微分方程理论的交叉研究。

title: Boundary regularity and Wiener-type criteria at infinity for nonlinear elliptic equations of $p$-Laplace type
summary: We study boundary regularity at the infinity point $\boldsymbol{\infty}$ for nonlinear elliptic equations of $p$-Laplace type in unbounded open sets $Ω\subset \mathbf{R}^n$. We consider the case $p \ge n \ge 2$ and characterize the regularity at $\boldsymbol{\infty}$ by means of Wiener-type integrals. Our approach uses circular inversion, which maps $\boldsymbol{\infty}$ to the origin and the original nonlinear equation to a similar weighted equation. The Wiener criterion at the origin for such equations is then transformed back to provide Wiener-type criteria at $\boldsymbol{\infty}$. When $p>n$, the criteria simplify so that $\boldsymbol{\infty}$ is regular if and only if the boundary $\partialΩ$ is unbounded. For $p=n$ this is not true, as shown by an example. This simplified criterion is also proved for $p$-harmonic functions in unbounded open subsets of Ahlfors $Q$-regular metric measure spaces with $Q<p$, supporting a Poincaré inequality.

AI.tldr: 建立了无界区域中p-Laplace型方程在无穷远点边界正则性的Wiener型准则
AI.motivation: 研究无界开集Ω⊂ℝⁿ中p-Laplace型非线性椭圆方程在无穷远点∞处的边界正则性，填补了经典Wiener准则在无穷远点分析的空白
AI.techniques: 使用圆周反演变换将无穷远点映射到原点，将原方程转化为加权方程，利用原点处的Wiener准则并通过反演变换得到无穷远点的Wiener型准则
AI.main_theorems: 当p>n时，∞点正则当且仅当边界∂Ω无界；当p=n时此结论不成立；在Ahlfors Q-正则度量测度空间中，对Q<p且支持Poincaré不等式的无界开子集，建立了p-调和函数的简化准则
AI.significance: 将经典Wiener准则推广到无穷远点，为无界区域中非线性椭圆方程边界正则性提供了完整理论框架，在度量测度空间理论中也有重要应用

title: Fokker--Planck equations and n--dimensional Poincaré inequalities for isotropic densities
summary: We consider new connections between the problem of trend to equilibrium for the n-dimensional Fokker--Planck equation of statistical physics, and weighted Poincaré inequality. To this aim we consider a class of n-dimensional Fokker--Planck equations with variable isotropic coefficient of diffusion and drift, inspired by the analogous one-dimensional Fokker--Planck equation appearing when studying the evolution of wealth distribution.

AI.tldr: 建立了n维Fokker-Planck方程趋近平衡问题与加权Poincaré不等式之间的新联系
AI.motivation: 研究统计物理学中n维Fokker-Planck方程的平衡趋近问题，特别是受到研究财富分布演化时出现的一维Fokker-Planck方程的启发
AI.techniques: 加权Poincaré不等式、各向同性扩散系数、漂移项分析、平衡态收敛性方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了n维Fokker-Planck方程趋近平衡与加权Poincaré不等式之间的新联系，考虑了具有变量各向同性扩散系数和漂移项的方程类
AI.significance: 为Fokker-Planck方程的收敛性分析提供了新的理论框架，将一维财富分布模型推广到高维，连接了统计物理与泛函分析中的不等式理论

title: Global stabilization and emergence tracking via aquatic control in an age-structured mosquito model
summary: This paper presents an age-structured, non-autonomous logistic model describing the aquatic and adult stages of the dynamics of malaria-vector mosquitoes. We propose a biological control strategy targeting the aquatic compartment and implement a tracking control for its emergence. A feedback control law guarantees stabilization of the emergent population density, specifically the global asymptotic stability of the logistic model. Additionally, a feedforward controller combined with feedback is introduced to steer the emergent density toward a time-varying reference trajectory. The analytical findings are corroborated and illustrated by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对疟疾媒介蚊子的年龄结构非自治逻辑模型，并设计了结合反馈和前馈的生物控制策略来稳定蚊虫种群密度。
AI.motivation: 研究疟疾媒介蚊子的种群动力学，特别是水生阶段和成虫阶段的相互作用，旨在开发有效的生物控制策略来减少疟疾传播。
AI.techniques: 使用年龄结构非自治逻辑模型、反馈控制律、前馈控制器、全局渐近稳定性分析，以及数值模拟验证。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 反馈控制律保证涌现种群密度的稳定化，即逻辑模型的全局渐近稳定性；2) 结合前馈和反馈的控制器能够引导涌现密度跟踪时变参考轨迹。
AI.significance: 为疟疾媒介控制提供了数学理论框架，将控制理论应用于生物种群管理，具有公共卫生应用价值，特别是在热带疾病防控领域。

title: Uniformly rotating Euler flows with compactly supported velocity
summary: For any positive integer $k$, we prove the existence of nontrivial $C^k$-smooth uniformly rotating solutions to the 2D incompressible Euler equations with compact spatial support. These solutions, which can be chosen to be small perturbations of radial flows, are the first example of smooth rotating flows with finite energy which are not locally radial. We also prove new rigidity results for rotating solutions which show that the geometric structure of these flows is severely constrained.

AI.tldr: 证明了2D不可压缩Euler方程存在具有紧支集的光滑旋转解，这是首个非局部径向的光滑旋转流有限能量解
AI.motivation: 研究2D不可压缩Euler方程的旋转解，特别是寻找具有紧支集的光滑解，解决长期以来关于是否存在非局部径向光滑旋转流的问题
AI.techniques: 扰动方法（小扰动径向流）、紧支集构造、旋转解几何约束分析、刚性定理证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对任意正整数k，存在C^k光滑的均匀旋转解，具有紧空间支集；2. 这些解可作为径向流的小扰动选择；3. 证明了旋转解的新刚性结果，显示其几何结构受到严格约束
AI.significance: 首次构造出非局部径向的光滑旋转有限能量解，填补了理论空白；刚性结果为理解旋转解的几何性质提供了新视角，对流体力学和偏微分方程理论有重要意义

title: Helical vortex filaments with compactly supported cross-sectional vorticity for the incompressible Euler equations in $\mathbb{R}^3$
summary: We revisit the vortex filament conjecture for three-dimensional inviscid and incompressible Euler flows with helical symmetry and no swirl. Using gluing arguments, we provide the first construction of a smooth helical vortex filament in the whole space $\mathbb{R}^3$ whose cross-sectional vorticity is compactly supported in $\mathbb{R}^2$ for all times. The construction extends to a multi-vortex solution comprising several helical filaments arranged along a regular polygon. Our approach yields fine asymptotics for the vorticity cores, thus improving related variational results for smooth solutions in bounded helical domains and infinite pipes, as well as non-smooth vortex patches in the whole space.

AI.tldr: 首次在全空间构造光滑螺旋涡丝解，支持三维无粘不可压欧拉方程的涡丝猜想
AI.motivation: 研究三维无粘不可压欧拉方程在螺旋对称无旋条件下的涡丝猜想，该猜想预测涡量集中在细丝结构上
AI.techniques: 使用粘合论证(gluing arguments)构造光滑解，分析涡核渐近行为，处理多涡丝多边形排列
AI.main_theorems: 首次在全空间构造光滑螺旋涡丝解，其横截面涡量紧支于平面；推广到多涡丝多边形排列；获得涡核精细渐近
AI.significance: 改进有界螺旋域和无限管道中光滑解的变分结果，超越非光滑涡斑解，为涡丝猜想提供严格数学构造

title: Optimal uniform regularity and asymptotic behavior of solutions to Lotka-Volterra type systems with strong competition and asymmetric coefficients

AI.tldr: 建立了Lotka-Volterra型强竞争系统在非对称和非齐次情况下的最优一致正则性理论
AI.motivation: 研究Lotka-Volterra型强竞争系统在Dirichlet边界条件下，当竞争强度β→∞时解的一致正则性和渐近行为。现有文献仅处理对称系数和齐次竞争项的情况，本文要解决非对称系数和非齐次竞争项这一更具挑战性的问题。
AI.techniques: Alt-Caffarelli-Friedman型单调性公式、爆破分析、一致有界性到Lipschitz有界性的提升、界面附近的尖锐点态估计
AI.main_theorems: 1) 解的一致有界性蕴含一致内部和全局Lipschitz有界性；2) 建立了非对称/非齐次情况下的最优一致正则性结果；3) 推导了不同组分界面附近密度的尖锐定量点态估计
AI.significance: 将Lotka-Volterra竞争系统的最优正则性理论从对称齐次情形推广到更一般的非对称非齐次情形，为理解强竞争下物种的空间分布和界面行为提供了严格的数学基础

title: On Rellich-type asymptotics for eigenfunctions on rank one symmetric spaces of noncompact type
summary:
We study eigenfunctions of the Laplace-Beltrami operator $Δ_X$ in exterior domains $Ω$ of rank-one Riemannian symmetric spaces of noncompact type $X$, a class that includes all hyperbolic spaces. Extending the classical $L^2$-Rellich theorem for the Euclidean Laplacian, we investigate the asymptotic behavior and $L^p$-integrability of solutions to the Helmholtz equation
  \[
  Δ_X f + (λ^2 + ρ^2) f = 0 \quad \text{in } Ω,
  \]
  where $λ\in \mathbb{C}\setminus i\mathbb{Z}$ and $ρ$ is the half-sum of positive roots.
  We obtain sharp Rellich-type quantitative $L^p$-growth estimates of~$f$ in geodesic annuli, leading to the nonexistence of $L^p(Ω)$-solutions for the optimal range $1 \leq p \leq 2$ and spectral parameters $λ$ satisfying $|Im(λ)| \leq (2/p - 1)ρ$. As a by-product of our study, we also establish a Rellich-type uniqueness theorem for eigenfunctions in terms of Hardy-type norms. Our results geometrically extend the Euclidean Rellich theorem, revealing how exponential volume growth and the dependence of the $L^p$-spectrum of $Δ_X$ on $p$ give rise to genuinely non-Euclidean spectral phenomena.

AI.tldr: 在非紧型秩一黎曼对称空间外部区域中，建立了Helmholtz方程解的L^p增长估计和不存在性定理，推广了经典的欧几里得Rellich定理。
AI.motivation: 研究非紧型秩一黎曼对称空间（包括所有双曲空间）上Laplace-Beltrami算子的特征函数在外部区域中的渐近行为和L^p可积性，推广经典的欧几里得Rellich定理到更一般的几何框架。
AI.techniques: 使用几何分析、调和分析技术，包括Hardy型范数、测地线环上的L^p增长估计，以及非欧几里得几何中体积指数增长对谱性质的影响分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了Helmholtz方程解的尖锐Rellich型L^p增长估计；2. 证明了在最优范围1≤p≤2和谱参数满足|Im(λ)|≤(2/p-1)ρ时，L^p(Ω)解的不存在性；3. 建立了基于Hardy型范数的Rellich型唯一性定理。
AI.significance: 揭示了非欧几里得几何中指数体积增长和L^p谱对p的依赖性如何产生本质不同的谱现象，为对称空间上的谱理论和偏微分方程研究提供了新的理论工具。

title: Ground states of the defocusing NLSE with a point interaction
summary: Suppose that either (i) $N = 2$, $α\in \mathbb{R}$ and $p > 2$ or (ii) $N = 3$, $α< 0$ and $2 < p < 3$. We prove that there exists an explicitly computable $μ_0 = μ_0 (N, α, p) > 0$ such that if $0 < μ< μ_0$, then the following normalized semilinear elliptic problem with a point interaction admits ground states: \[ \begin{cases} - Δ_αu + ωu + u |u|^{p - 2} = 0 &\text{in} ~ \mathbb{R}^N; \\ \|u\|_{\mathscr{L}^2}^2 = μ, \end{cases} \] where $- Δ_α$ denotes the Laplacian of point interaction (centered at the origin) with inverse scattering length $- 2 (N - 1) πα$ and we want to solve for $ω\in \mathbb{R}$, $u \colon \mathbb{R}^N \to \mathbb{R}$. We remark that this kind of solutions does not exist in the framework of the defocusing NLSE without a point interaction.

AI.tldr: 证明了带点相互作用的归一化半线性椭圆问题在特定参数范围内存在基态解
AI.motivation: 研究带点相互作用的归一化半线性椭圆问题，这类问题在没有点相互作用的散焦非线性薛定谔方程框架中不存在解
AI.techniques: 使用点相互作用拉普拉斯算子，通过显式计算临界参数μ₀，应用变分方法和临界点理论
AI.main_theorems: 存在显式可计算的μ₀(N,α,p)>0，使得当0<μ<μ₀时，带点相互作用的归一化半线性椭圆问题存在基态解
AI.significance: 首次证明了带点相互作用的归一化问题存在基态解，填补了散焦NLSE框架中此类解不存在的空白，为量子力学中点相互作用模型提供了数学基础

title: Pointwise bounds on Dirichlet Green's functions for a singular drift term
summary: We introduce a technique to obtain pointwise upper and lower bounds for the Green's function of elliptic operators whose principal part is the Laplacian and that include a drift term diverging near the boundary like a power of the inverse distance with exponent less than 1, in the unit ball B(0,1) \subset \mathbb{R}^n, n \ge 3. The constants in the upper estimates are uniform in B(0,r) for each r < 1, with explicit dependence on r. The drift here belongs to C^{1,α}_{\mathrm{loc}} and may, more generally, be majorized by a function radially integrable up to the boundary. These appear to be the first such estimates for non-coercive drifts and remain new even for smooth drifts, suggesting extensions to singular potentials and other settings where energy methods fail.

AI.tldr: 首次获得具有边界发散漂移项的椭圆算子格林函数的逐点上下界估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有边界发散漂移项的椭圆算子的格林函数估计问题，这类算子的漂移项在边界附近以距离倒数的幂次发散（指数小于1），且属于非强制性问题，传统能量方法失效。
AI.techniques: 引入新技术获得逐点估计，漂移项属于局部C^{1,α}类，更一般地可由径向可积到边界的函数控制，估计中的常数在B(0,r)中一致（r<1）且对r有显式依赖。
AI.main_theorems: 在单位球B(0,1)⊂ℝⁿ（n≥3）中，对主部为拉普拉斯算子且包含边界发散漂移项的椭圆算子，首次获得格林函数的逐点上下界估计。
AI.significance: 这是非强制漂移项情况下的首个此类估计，即使对光滑漂移项也是新结果，可推广到奇异势能和其他能量方法失效的情形，为研究边界奇异性问题提供了新工具。

title: BMO solvability with singular drifts on ample sawtooth domains implies $L^p$ solvability
summary: For a linear elliptic operator with a singular drift that satisfies a finite Carleson measure condition, we prove that there exist `ample' sawtooth domains of the unit ball $B(0,1)\subset \R^{n+1}$ so that a BMO solvability assumption in these sawtooth subdomains implies that the elliptic measure satisfies the weak $A_\infty$ condition with respect to the surface measure on this `ample' sawtooth domain. This is a quantifiable absolute continuity condition, which is equivalent to saying the $L^p$ Dirichlet problem is solvable for some $1<p<\infty$. Such singular drifts have been considered in the literature in the context of perturbative $L^p$ Dirichlet solvability problems, by Hofmann-Lewis and Kenig-Pipher. By an ample sawtooth domain, we mean a sawtooth domain whose boundary coincides with the boundary of the unit ball, except for an arbitrarily small fraction. The methods can be naturally extended to show the result for more general bounded Lipschitz domains.

AI.tldr: 证明了对于满足有限Carleson测度条件的奇异漂移线性椭圆算子，存在"充分"的锯齿状子域，使得在这些子域中的BMO可解性假设能推出椭圆测度关于表面测度满足弱A∞条件。
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异漂移的线性椭圆算子的Dirichlet问题可解性，这类问题在Hofmann-Lewis和Kenig-Pipher的工作中已有研究，属于扰动性L^p Dirichlet可解性问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Carleson测度条件、锯齿状域构造、BMO空间分析、椭圆测度理论、弱A∞条件等工具，通过局部化到"充分"锯齿状子域来建立可解性。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：对于满足有限Carleson测度条件的奇异漂移椭圆算子，存在边界几乎与单位球面重合的锯齿状子域，使得这些子域中的BMO可解性假设蕴含椭圆测度关于表面测度满足弱A∞条件，这等价于L^p Dirichlet问题对某个1<p<∞可解。
AI.significance: 为具有奇异漂移的椭圆算子的Dirichlet问题可解性提供了量化绝对连续性条件，将结果从单位球推广到一般有界Lipschitz域，深化了对扰动性边界值问题的理解。

title: Fully nonlinear second-order mean field games with nondifferentiable Hamiltonians
summary: We analyse fully nonlinear second-order mean field games (MFG) with nondifferentiable Hamiltonians, which take the form of a coupled system of a fully nonlinear Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation and a Kolmogorov-Fokker-Planck partial differential inclusion (PDI) featuring the set-valued subdifferential of the Hamiltonian. We show the existence of solutions of some stationary MFG systems with quite general coupling operators and nonnegative distributional source terms, on general bounded convex domains, under the primary assumptions of uniform ellipticity and the Cordes condition on the diffusion coefficient. The existence proof is founded on an original, and equivalent, reformulation of the PDI as a nonstandard variational inequality (VI), that offers significant flexibility in passages to limits. Furthermore, the uniqueness of the solution of the PDI/VI system is proved in the case of strictly monotone couplings. We then show how the MFG PDI/VI system in the fully nonlinear setting can be obtained as the limit of a sequence of PDE systems with differentiable Hamiltonians, and we give further results on the continuous dependence of the solution.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有不可微Hamiltonian的全非线性二阶平均场博弈系统的存在性理论，通过将偏微分包含转化为变分不等式来获得解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有不可微Hamiltonian的全非线性二阶平均场博弈系统，这类系统在经济学、金融和工程中有广泛应用，但不可微性给理论分析带来挑战。
AI.techniques: 将偏微分包含转化为变分不等式，利用一致椭圆性和Cordes条件，通过极限过程处理不可微Hamiltonian。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了稳态MFG系统解的存在性（在一般凸区域上），建立了PDI与VI的等价性，证明了严格单调耦合下的唯一性，以及从可微系统到不可微系统的极限收敛性。
AI.significance: 为具有不可微Hamiltonian的MFG系统建立了系统的存在性理论，提供了处理不可微问题的变分不等式框架，扩展了MFG理论的应用范围。

title: Quantitative blow-up suppression for the Patlak-Keller-Segel(-Navier-Stokes) system via Couette flow on $\mathbb{R}^2$
summary: When the initial mass of the density function is greater than $8 π$, the solutions to the 2D Patlak-Keller-Segel system will blow up in a finite time on $\mathbb{R}^2$. In this paper, we investigate the mixing effect arising from a Couette flow with quantized amplitude, which makes it difficult for bacteria to concentrate. For the Patlak-Keller-Segel system near Couette flow $(Ay,0)$ on $\mathbb{R}^2$, it is proved that if the amplitude $A$ is sufficiently large in the form of $C_* \left(\| \langle D_x\rangle^{m} \langle {D_x}^{-1}\rangle^εn_{\mathrm{in}} \|_{L^2}^2+1\right)^{{9}/{2}} < \infty$, the solutions are global in time. In particular, in this case, an upper bound for $C_*$ is precisely estimated as $2,058,614$. For the Patlak-Keller-Segel-Navier-Stokes system near Couette flow on $\mathbb{R}^2$, it is also proved that if the amplitude is sufficiently large in the form of $C_*\|(n_{\rm in}, |D_x|^{1/3} n_{\rm in},ω_{\rm in})\|_{Y_{m,ε}}^9$, the solutions are global in time.

AI.tldr: 研究Couette流对二维Patlak-Keller-Segel系统爆破行为的抑制效应，证明当振幅足够大时解全局存在
AI.motivation: 经典2D Patlak-Keller-Segel系统当初值质量大于8π时会在有限时间内爆破，研究Couette流（剪切流）的混合效应对爆破行为的抑制机制
AI.techniques: 使用Couette流增强混合效应，通过傅里叶分析处理剪切流带来的非定常性，利用能量估计和正则性分析控制解的增长
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对PKS系统：当Couette流振幅A足够大（满足特定条件）时解全局存在，给出常数C*的上界估计为2,058,614；2. 对PKS-NS系统：当振幅足够大时解也全局存在
AI.significance: 首次量化证明了Couette流对PKS系统爆破的抑制效应，为理解流体混合对生物聚集现象的影响提供了严格数学基础，对反应扩散方程与流体耦合系统的研究有重要理论意义

title: The doubling property of the elliptic measure, for elliptic operators with drifts satisfying an average diverging condition
summary: We show doubling of the elliptic measure corresponding to the operator with an elliptic principal term and a drift that diverges, on average on Whitney cubes, like the inverse distance to the boundary, with a small constant. Essentially a small Carleson constant assumption on the drift, this generalizes earlier results with the hypothesis of pointwise smallness of such a drift. This relates to recent perturbative results of rough Dirichlet solvability in domains with drifts or potentials that satisfy a Carleson measure condition, which have also been considered earlier by Hofmann-Lewis and Kenig-Pipher. While we work in 1-sided chord arc domains, these results are new even for the half-space. In the process, we also prove Hardy inequalities in such domains with Alhfors-David regular boundary, using a stopping time argument.

AI.tldr: 证明了在椭圆主项和满足Carleson测度条件的漂移项算子下，椭圆测度的加倍性质
AI.motivation: 研究具有发散漂移项的椭圆算子的椭圆测度加倍性质，漂移项在Whitney立方体上平均发散如边界距离的倒数，但具有小常数。这推广了先前要求漂移项逐点小的结果，与近期关于满足Carleson测度条件的漂移或势的粗糙Dirichlet可解性扰动结果相关。
AI.techniques: 使用Carleson测度条件、Whitney立方体分析、停止时间论证、Hardy不等式证明、1-侧弦弧域上的分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在满足Carleson测度条件的小常数漂移下，椭圆测度加倍性质成立；2. 在Alhfors-David正则边界域中证明Hardy不等式；3. 结果即使在半空间情形下也是新的
AI.significance: 将椭圆测度加倍性质从逐点小漂移推广到Carleson测度条件，连接了近期关于粗糙Dirichlet可解性的扰动理论，为具有发散漂移的椭圆算子理论提供了新工具，即使在经典半空间情形也有新贡献。

title: Vanishing viscosity limit of the 2D stationary Navier-Stokes equations outside a rotating disc and its application
summary:
In this paper, we establish the vanishing viscosity limit result of the 2D stationary Navier-Stokes equations outside a rotating disc. On the boundary of the disc, the fluid is subjected to a small perturbation of a non zero rotation of rigid body. While at the spacial infinity, the fluid stays at rest. Due to the Prandtl-Batchelor theory, the limiting Euler solution is chosen to be the rotation flow $\frac{A}{r} e_θ$ for some suitable constant $A$, which is determined by the Batchelor-Wood formula. When the viscosity approaches to zero, we will construct a solution to the 2D Navier-Stokes equations by using higher order asymptotic approximation and show the validity of the boundary layer expansion. Also the asymptotic behavior of the solution at spacial infinity is obtained. Our result partially answers one of the open problems (Problem 11b) raised by V. I. Yudovich in [Eleven great problems of mathematical hydrodynamics, Mosc. Math. J. 3 (2003), no. 2, 711--737].
  As an application, we can show an existence result to the 2D stationary Navier-Stokes equations with fixed viscosity outside a disc when the fluid is subjected to a large perturbation of a fast rotation of rigid body at the boundary.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维稳态Navier-Stokes方程在旋转圆盘外区域的消失黏性极限，验证了边界层展开的有效性
AI.motivation: 研究二维稳态Navier-Stokes方程在旋转圆盘外区域的消失黏性极限问题，部分回答了Yudovich提出的流体力学11大问题之一（问题11b），涉及边界层理论和Prandtl-Batchelor理论
AI.techniques: 使用高阶渐近近似方法构造Navier-Stokes方程解，验证边界层展开的有效性，应用Prandtl-Batchelor理论和Batchelor-Wood公式确定极限Euler解
AI.main_theorems: 建立了消失黏性极限结果，构造了Navier-Stokes方程的解并验证了边界层展开，得到了空间无穷远处的渐近行为，作为应用证明了在边界快速旋转大扰动下固定黏性系数的存在性结果
AI.significance: 部分解决了Yudovich提出的流体力学开放问题，为旋转边界层理论提供了严格数学基础，对理解黏性流体向无黏极限的过渡有重要意义

title: On a calculation method of the thickness via partial differential equations
summary: This paper presents a mathematical analysis of an elliptic partial differential equation (PDE) designed to compute the geometric thickness of a given shape. The PDE-based formulation provides a direct and systematic approach to evaluate thickness through the elliptic equation, whose solution yields a vector field from which the thickness is extracted as the divergence. While the convergence of this PDE-based thickness to the geometric thickness had been rigorously justified only for simple geometries such as intervals and straight bands, its validity for more general shapes remained open. In this work, we extend the analysis to annular domains, where curvature effects are nontrivial. We prove that the PDE-based thickness converges to the geometric thickness as the diffusion parameter tends to zero by estimating the difference between two notions of thickness with the square root of the diffusion parameter. Explicit expressions involving modified Bessel functions are obtained for annuli, together with sharp inequalities for their ratios. These results provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for the PDE-based thickness and demonstrate its potential as a reliable tool in shape analysis and topology optimization.

AI.tldr: 证明了在环形区域上，基于椭圆PDE的厚度定义收敛于几何厚度，为形状分析提供了严格数学基础
AI.motivation: 之前基于椭圆PDE的厚度计算方法仅在简单几何形状（如区间、直带）上被严格证明收敛于几何厚度，对于更复杂的形状（特别是具有曲率的环形区域）的收敛性尚未解决
AI.techniques: 椭圆PDE分析、渐近分析、修正贝塞尔函数、扩散参数趋于零的极限分析、厚度差值的平方根估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在环形区域上，PDE厚度收敛于几何厚度；2. 两种厚度定义之差以扩散参数的平方根为界；3. 获得了环形区域厚度的显式表达式（含修正贝塞尔函数）及其比值的不等式
AI.significance: 为基于PDE的厚度计算方法提供了严格的数学理论基础，证明了该方法在具有曲率的复杂形状上的有效性，为形状分析和拓扑优化提供了可靠工具

title: Harnack inequalities for nonlocal operators with supercritical drifts and their applications
summary: In this paper, we investigate Harnack estimates for weak solutions to the following nonlocal equation: $$ \partial_t u = Δ^{α/2} u + b \cdot \nabla u + f, $$ where $Δ^{α/2}$ denotes the fractional Laplacian, $b$ is a divergence-free vector field in a critical or supercritical regularity regime, and $f$ is a distribution in a fractional Sobolev space with negative indices. As applications of the analytical results obtained in this paper, we establish the well-posedness of critical stochastic quasi-geostrophic equations driven by additive Brownian noise, prove the existence of weak solutions to the two-dimensional fractional Navier--Stokes equations with measure-valued initial vorticity, and demonstrate the well-posedness of generalized martingale problems associated with critical stochastic differential equations.

AI.tldr: 建立了带临界或超临界散度自由向量场的分数阶抛物型方程弱解的Harnack估计
AI.motivation: 研究非局部方程∂_t u = Δ^{α/2}u + b·∇u + f的Harnack估计，其中b是散度自由的临界或超临界正则性向量场，f是负指数分数阶Sobolev空间中的分布，这类方程出现在多个重要物理模型中
AI.techniques: 分数阶Laplacian分析、散度自由向量场处理、临界正则性理论、Harnack不等式证明、弱解理论、概率方法（广义鞅问题）
AI.main_theorems: 建立了非局部方程弱解的Harnack估计，并应用于：1) 临界随机准地转方程加性布朗噪声的适定性；2) 二维分数阶Navier-Stokes方程测度值初始涡度的弱解存在性；3) 临界随机微分方程广义鞅问题的适定性
AI.significance: 为带临界向量场的分数阶抛物型方程提供了重要的正则性理论，统一处理了多个重要物理模型的数学分析，包括准地转方程、分数阶Navier-Stokes方程和随机微分方程，具有广泛的理论和应用价值

title: Inverse problem for the discrete Maxwell equations in a bounded paving
summary: We consider the discrete anisotropic Maxwell operator DaH0 on a bounded paving $Ω$ $\subset$ Z3 , where H0 denotes discrete isotropic Maxwell operator and Da a diagonal operator of multiplication containing information about the anisotropy of the medium inside $Ω$. Letting a complex number $λ$ __ = 0 such the Dirichlet-to-Neumann operator $Λ$(Da) associated with the system DaH0 u = $λ$u on $Ω$ admits a unique solution, we show that knowing $Λ$(Da) is sufficient to determine Da by a reconstruction procedure for Da.

AI.tldr: 证明了离散各向异性Maxwell算子的Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子唯一确定介质各向异性参数
AI.motivation: 研究离散各向异性介质中Maxwell算子的逆散射问题，通过边界测量数据（Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子）来重建介质内部各向异性参数
AI.techniques: 使用离散各向异性Maxwell算子理论、Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子方法、边界控制方法、算子重构技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子Λ(Da)唯一确定对角算子Da，即从边界测量可以完全重建介质各向异性参数
AI.significance: 为离散介质中的电磁逆散射问题提供了理论基础，在计算电磁学、医学成像和材料无损检测中有重要应用

title: Half-plane Green`s function for anti-plane elastic 1D hexagonal QCs
summary: This paper presents an analytical derivation of a frequency-dependent fundamental solution plus a Green's function for the uni-dimensional, hexagonal quasicrystal sheet subjected to elastic waves under anti-plane strain conditions. Furthermore, closed-form solutions for the free-fields developing in this sheet for propagating shear waves are also obtained. The analysis presented here provides a foundation for understanding quasicrystal dynamic behavior and for advancing relevant computational methods.

AI.tldr: 推导了一维六方准晶薄板在反平面应变条件下弹性波传播的频率相关基本解和格林函数
AI.motivation: 研究准晶材料在动态载荷下的弹性波传播问题，为理解准晶动态行为和开发相关计算方法提供理论基础
AI.techniques: 解析推导方法，包括频率相关基本解构造、格林函数建立，以及剪切波传播自由场的闭式解
AI.main_theorems: 获得了一维六方准晶薄板在反平面应变条件下的频率相关基本解、格林函数，以及剪切波传播自由场的闭式解
AI.significance: 为准晶动态行为理解提供了数学基础，为相关计算方法的开发奠定了基础，对准晶材料力学和波传播研究有重要理论价值

title: Isogeometric fluid-structure interaction using a mixed continuous/discontinuous Galerkin scheme
summary: A mixed continuous / discontinuous Galerkin scheme is introduced for the simulation of fluid-structure interaction problems in an isogeometric analysis framework. The properties of Non-Uniform Rational B-Spline basis functions are leveraged to enable an exact transfer of the structural displacement to the fluid domain, while using different discretizations and refinements on the two sides of the coupling interface. The proposed approach is applied to the simulation of a compressible flow around an elastic wing membrane and to a classical fluid-structure benchmark involving the flow around a cylinder equipped with a hyper-elastic bar. For both cases, the results obtained are compared to those found in the literature to assess the accuracy of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于等几何分析的混合连续/间断Galerkin格式，用于流固耦合问题的精确模拟。
AI.motivation: 研究流固耦合问题的数值模拟，特别是在等几何分析框架下，需要处理结构位移到流体域的精确传递，同时允许耦合界面两侧采用不同的离散化和细化策略。
AI.techniques: 混合连续/间断Galerkin格式，利用非均匀有理B样条基函数的特性，实现结构位移到流体域的精确传递，支持耦合界面两侧不同的离散化和细化。
AI.main_theorems: 开发了一种新的数值方法，应用于可压缩流绕弹性翼膜的模拟和经典流固耦合基准问题（圆柱绕流与超弹性杆），通过与文献结果比较验证了方法的准确性。
AI.significance: 该方法结合了等几何分析和混合Galerkin格式的优势，为流固耦合问题提供了更精确、灵活的数值模拟工具，在航空航天和工程力学领域有重要应用价值。

title: Long-time asymptotics of the good Boussinesq equation and its modified version: Painlevé region
summary: This work investigates the long-time asymptotic behaviors of initial value problem for the good Boussinesq equation and the modified Boussinesq equation in Painlevé region. The Deift-Zhou steepest descent method is used to deform the associated $3 \times 3$ Riemann-Hilbert problem to the Painlevé IV model. Then asymptotic formulas for the modified Boussinesq equation in both the Painlevé region and the Painlevé transition region are derived, characterized by the Clarkson-McLeod solution of the Painlevé IV equation. Additionally, the leading-order term of the good Boussinesq equation in Painlevé region is obtained via the Miura transformation. The theoretical asymptotic solutions are validated against direct numerical simulations, confirming the accuracy of the asymptotic analysis.

AI.tldr: 使用Deift-Zhou最速下降法研究好Boussinesq方程和修正Boussinesq方程在Painlevé区域的长时间渐近行为，得到由Painlevé IV方程的Clarkson-McLeod解表征的渐近公式。
AI.motivation: 研究Boussinesq方程在Painlevé区域的长时间渐近行为，这类方程在流体力学和非线性波传播中有重要应用，理解其渐近行为对理论分析和数值模拟都有重要意义。
AI.techniques: Deift-Zhou最速下降法，3×3黎曼-希尔伯特问题变形，Painlevé IV模型约化，Miura变换，Clarkson-McLeod解，数值模拟验证。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 修正Boussinesq方程在Painlevé区域和Painlevé过渡区域的渐近公式，由Painlevé IV方程的Clarkson-McLeod解表征；2. 通过Miura变换得到好Boussinesq方程在Painlevé区域的领头阶项。
AI.significance: 首次系统研究Boussinesq方程在Painlevé区域的渐近行为，建立了与Painlevé超越函数的联系，为理解非线性波动方程的长时间行为提供了新视角，并通过数值验证增强了理论可靠性。

title: Regularity theory for degenerate fully nonlinear nonlocal equations with a Hamiltonian term
summary: We investigate a class of degenerate fully nonlinear nonlocal elliptic equations with Hamiltonian terms. By precisely characterizing the interaction between the degeneracy law of equations and the growth behavior of the Hamiltonian terms, we establish the Lipschitz regularity of viscosity solutions by the Ishii-Lions method, and further show the gradient Hölder continuity for solutions via utilizing perturbation techniques. Additionally, under minimal assumptions on the degeneracy pattern, the $C^1$-differentiability property of solutions is explored as well.

AI.tldr: 建立了退化完全非线性非局部椭圆方程在Hamilton项存在下解的正则性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有Hamilton项的退化完全非线性非局部椭圆方程，这类方程在随机控制、最优停止问题等应用中具有重要意义，但退化性和非局部算子的结合带来了分析上的挑战
AI.techniques: Ishii-Lions方法、摄动技术、粘性解理论、非局部算子分析、退化椭圆方程的正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 解的Lipschitz正则性：通过精确刻画方程退化律与Hamilton项增长行为之间的相互作用建立；2. 解的梯度Hölder连续性：利用摄动技术证明；3. 解的C¹可微性：在最小退化模式假设下探索
AI.significance: 为退化非局部椭圆方程的正则性理论提供了系统框架，将经典椭圆方程的正则性结果推广到非局部情形，对随机控制、最优停止等应用领域具有重要理论价值

title: Robustness of Morse decomposition for non-local perturbations of the Chafee-Infante equation
summary: In this paper, we prove the robustness of the Morse decomposition for the global attractor of the Chafee-Infante problem with respect to non-local perturbations. Focusing on a non-local perturbation of the diffusion term, we establish that the Morse structure of the local limit problem is preserved as long as the non-local function multiplying the laplacian operator remains close to a positive constant.

AI.tldr: 证明了Chafee-Infante问题全局吸引子的Morse分解对非局部扰动具有鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 研究非局部扰动下动力系统的结构稳定性，特别是Chafee-Infante问题的全局吸引子Morse分解在非局部扩散项扰动下的保持性
AI.techniques: 非局部扰动分析、Morse分解理论、全局吸引子理论、参数连续依赖性、扩散算子的扰动分析
AI.main_theorems: 当非局部函数接近正常数时，局部极限问题的Morse结构得以保持，即全局吸引子的Morse分解对这类非局部扰动具有鲁棒性
AI.significance: 为理解非局部扰动下动力系统结构的稳定性提供了理论基础，对非局部偏微分方程的动力系统分析有重要意义

title: The dispersion relation of Tollmien-Schlichting waves
summary: It is well-known that shear flows in a strip or in the half plane are unstable for the Navier-Stokes equations if the viscosity $ν$ is small enough, provided the horizontal wave number $α$ lies in a small interval, between the so called lower and upper marginal stability curves. The corresponding instabilities are called Tollmien-Schlichting waves. In this letter, we give a simple presentation of the dispersion relation of these waves and study its mathematical properties.

AI.tldr: 对Navier-Stokes方程中Tollmien-Schlichting波的色散关系进行简化表述并研究其数学性质
AI.motivation: 研究带状或半平面中剪切流在粘度ν足够小时的不稳定性问题，特别是当水平波数α位于上下边际稳定性曲线之间时出现的Tollmien-Schlichting波
AI.techniques: 色散关系分析、稳定性理论、Navier-Stokes方程的线性稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 给出了Tollmien-Schlichting波的色散关系的简化表述，并系统研究了其数学性质
AI.significance: 为理解剪切流不稳定性的物理机制提供了简明的数学框架，对流体力学稳定性理论和过渡湍流研究有重要意义

title: Bounded solutions and interpolative gap bounds for degenerate parabolic double phase problems
summary: We establish gradient higher integrability results for weak solutions to degenerate parabolic equations of double phase type $$ u_t-\operatorname{div} \left(|Du|^{p-2}Du + a(x,t)|Du|^{q-2}Du\right)=0 $$ in $Ω_T := Ω\times (0,T)$, where $a(\cdot)\in C^{α,\fracα{2}}(Ω_T)$. For bounded solutions, we prove that the result holds under the gap condition $$ q \leq p + α. $$ Moreover, for solutions with $$ u\in C(0,T;L^s(Ω)), \quad s \geq 2, $$ we obtain higher integrability under the gap condition $$ q \leq p + \frac{sα}{n+s}. $$ These results provide an interpolation between the gap bounds in the parabolic double phase setting.

AI.tldr: 建立了双相型退化抛物方程弱解梯度的高阶可积性结果，给出了依赖于解正则性的间隙条件
AI.motivation: 研究双相型退化抛物方程 $u_t-\operatorname{div}(|Du|^{p-2}Du + a(x,t)|Du|^{q-2}Du)=0$ 的梯度正则性，其中系数 $a(\cdot)$ 具有 Hölder 连续性。这类方程在非均匀介质建模中具有重要应用，需要建立梯度的高阶可积性结果。
AI.techniques: 使用抛物正则化方法、能量估计、覆盖引理和 De Giorgi 迭代技术，结合双相结构的特殊性质处理退化性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对有界解，在间隙条件 $q \leq p + α$ 下证明梯度高阶可积性；2. 对满足 $u\in C(0,T;L^s(Ω))$ 的解，在间隙条件 $q \leq p + \frac{sα}{n+s}$ 下获得高阶可积性
AI.significance: 建立了抛物双相方程梯度正则性的完整理论框架，给出了依赖于解正则性的最优间隙条件，为后续研究此类方程的更精细正则性理论奠定了基础

title: A sharp commutator estimate for all Riesz modulated energies
summary:
We prove a functional inequality in any dimension controlling the derivative along a transport of the Riesz modulated energy in terms of the modulated energy itself. This modulated energy was introduced by the third author and collaborators in the study of mean-field limits and statistical mechanics of Coulomb/Riesz gases, where this control is an essential ingredient. Previous work of the last two authors and Q.H. Nguyen arXiv:2107.02592 showed a similar functional inequality but with an additive $N$-dependent error (where $N$ is the number of particles, $\mathsf{d}$ the dimension, and $\mathsf{s}$ the inverse power of the Riesz potential) which was not sharp. In this paper, we obtain the optimal $N^{\frac{\mathsf{s}}{\mathsf{d}}-1}$ error, for all cases, including the sub-Coulomb case. Our method is conceptually simple and, like previous work, relies on the observation that the derivative along a transport of the modulated energy is the quadratic form of a commutator. Through a new potential truncation scheme based on a wavelet-type representation of the Riesz potential to handle its singularity, the proof reduces to averaging over a family of Kato-Ponce type estimates.
  The commutator estimate has applications to sharp rates of convergence for mean-field limits, quasi-neutral limits, and central limit theorems for the fluctuations of Coulomb/Riesz gases both at and out of thermal equilibrium. In particular, we show here for $\mathsf{s}<\mathsf{d}-2$ the expected $N^{\frac{\mathsf{s}}{\mathsf{d}}-1}$-rate in the modulated energy distance for the mean-field convergence of first-order Hamiltonian and gradient flows. This complements the recent work arXiv:2407.15650 on the optimal rate for the (super-)Coulomb case $\mathsf{d}-2\le \mathsf{s}<\mathsf{d}$ and therefore resolves the entire potential Riesz case.

AI.tldr: 证明了Riesz调制能量沿输运的导数控制不等式，获得了最优的N^(s/d-1)误差估计
AI.motivation: 研究Coulomb/Riesz气体的平均场极限和统计力学，需要控制调制能量沿粒子输运的导数。先前工作得到的N依赖误差项不尖锐，本文旨在获得最优误差估计
AI.techniques: 基于对易子的二次形式观察，采用小波型Riesz势截断方案处理奇异性，通过Kato-Ponce型估计的平均化方法
AI.main_theorems: 获得了最优的N^(s/d-1)误差估计的泛函不等式，覆盖所有情况包括亚Coulomb情形；证明了平均场极限的一阶Hamiltonian和梯度流的收敛速率
AI.significance: 完全解决了Riesz势情形的最优收敛速率问题，为平均场极限、准中性极限、Coulomb/Riesz气体涨落的中心极限定理提供了锐利估计工具

title: Stable Self- Similar Blow- Up In Nonlinear Wave Equations With Quadratic Time-Derivative Nonlinearities
summary: We study singularity formation in two one-dimensional nonlinear wave models with quadratic time-derivative nonlinearities. The non-null model violates the null condition and typically develops finite-time blow-up; the null-form model is Lorentz-invariant and enjoys small-data global existence, yet still admits blow-up for large data. Building on our earlier work on spatial-derivative nonlinearities, we construct and classify a five-parameter family of generalized self-similar blow-up solutions that captures the observed dynamics. We prove that no smooth exact self-similar profiles exist, while the generalized self-similar solutions -exhibiting logarithmic growth- provide the correct blow-up description inside backward light cones. We further establish asymptotic stability for the relevant branches, including the ODE-type blow-up in both models. These results yield a coherent and unified picture of blow-up mechanisms in time-derivative nonlinear wave equations.

AI.tldr: 构建并分类了五参数广义自相似爆破解族，揭示了时间导数非线性波动方程中奇点形成的统一机制
AI.motivation: 研究一维非线性波动模型中时间导数二次非线性项的奇点形成机制，对比违反零条件和非零条件模型的爆破行为差异
AI.techniques: 广义自相似性分析、对数增长解构造、分支稳定性理论、向后光锥内渐近分析、ODE型爆破机制研究
AI.main_theorems: 1) 不存在光滑精确自相似解；2) 构造了五参数广义自相似爆破解族；3) 证明了相关分支的渐近稳定性；4) 统一描述了时间导数非线性波动方程的爆破机制
AI.significance: 为时间导数非线性波动方程的奇点形成提供了统一理论框架，揭示了自相似爆破的对数修正本质，深化了对零条件在爆破动力学中作用的理解

title: Full range of infinite point blow-up exponents for the critical generalized KdV equation
summary: For the quintic, mass critical generalized Korteweg-de Vries equation, for any $ν\in (\frac{1}{2}, 1)$, we prove the existence of solutions in the energy space that blow up in finite time $T>0$ with the blow-up rate $\|\partial_x u(t)\|_{L^2} \sim (T-t)^{-ν}$ (infinite point blow-up). These solutions are constructed arbitrarily close to the family of solitons and correspond to the concentration of a soliton traveling at $+\infty$ in space as $t\uparrow T$. This complements the previous results obtained in the work of Martel, Merle, Raphaël in 2015 on infinite point exotic blow-up, which were valid under the technical restriction $ν>\frac {11}{13}$. The value $ν=\frac 12$ corresponds to a critical case to be treated elsewhere. At the technical level, we implement a modification of the virial-energy functional, to allow all $ν> \frac 12$ and simplify the proof of energy estimates.

AI.tldr: 证明了五次质量临界gKdV方程存在能量空间中以任意速率ν∈(1/2,1)爆破的解，完善了先前ν>11/13的限制
AI.motivation: 研究五次质量临界广义KdV方程的奇异爆破现象，特别是无限点爆破问题。先前Martel、Merle、Raphaël在2015年的工作存在技术限制ν>11/13，本文旨在突破这一限制，处理所有ν>1/2的情况。
AI.techniques: 修改了virial-energy泛函，简化了能量估计的证明，构造了接近孤子族的解，实现了在空间无穷远处孤子聚集的爆破机制。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意ν∈(1/2,1)，证明了五次质量临界gKdV方程存在能量空间中的解，在有限时间T>0以速率‖∂_x u(t)‖_{L^2}∼(T-t)^{-ν}爆破，这些解可任意接近孤子族，对应空间无穷远处孤子的聚集。
AI.significance: 完善了无限点奇异爆破理论，突破了先前ν>11/13的技术限制，为理解质量临界非线性色散方程的爆破机制提供了更完整的理论框架，ν=1/2的临界情况有待进一步研究。

title: A Smoluchowski-Kramers approximation for the stochastic variational wave equation
summary: We investigate the Smoluchowski-Kramers approximation for the one-dimensional periodic variational wave equation with state-dependent damping and additive noise. We show that weak ``dissipative'' solutions converge to solutions of a stochastic quasilinear parabolic equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了带有状态依赖阻尼和加性噪声的一维周期变分波方程的Smoluchowski-Kramers近似，其弱"耗散"解收敛于随机拟线性抛物方程的解
AI.motivation: 研究变分波方程在随机扰动下的渐近行为，特别是Smoluchowski-Kramers近似（从惯性系统到过阻尼系统的极限），这是统计物理和随机PDE中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 使用弱"耗散"解的概念，处理状态依赖阻尼的非线性性，应用随机分析和PDE理论中的极限过程技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了一维周期变分波方程在状态依赖阻尼和加性噪声下的弱"耗散"解收敛于随机拟线性抛物方程的解
AI.significance: 为随机变分波方程的渐近分析提供了理论基础，连接了波方程和抛物方程的随机动力学，对理解随机耗散系统的极限行为有重要意义

title: Hypoellipticity of analytic differential operators in general ultradifferentiable classes
summary: We show that analytic pseudodifferential and Fourier integral operators behave well for ultradifferentiable classes satisfying minimal regularity properties. As an application we investigate the ultradifferentiable regularity properties of several examples of analytic differential operators. In particular we extend Treves' characterization of the hypoellipticity of analytic operators of principal type to the ultradifferentiable category.

AI.tldr: 将解析伪微分算子和Fourier积分算子的良好性质推广到满足最小正则性条件的超可微函数类
AI.motivation: 研究解析伪微分算子和Fourier积分算子在超可微函数类中的行为，扩展解析微分算子的正则性理论，特别是将Treves关于主型解析算子亚椭圆性的刻画推广到超可微范畴
AI.techniques: 解析伪微分算子理论、Fourier积分算子理论、超可微函数空间理论、亚椭圆性分析、主型算子理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 解析伪微分算子和Fourier积分算子在满足最小正则性条件的超可微函数类中表现良好；2. 将Treves关于主型解析算子亚椭圆性的刻画推广到超可微范畴
AI.significance: 扩展了解析算子理论到更一般的函数空间，为超可微函数类中的偏微分方程理论提供基础，统一了不同正则性条件下的算子理论框架
